kind: quant-trading vein brain (cross-source mean-reversion canon: QEdges / RobotWealth / Chan / Alvarez / Aligrithm)
build_method: manual — distilled from the 2026-07-15 MR dig-queue deepening spec harvest (research/mr-vein/2026-07-15/ spec-01..06 + 37 raw full-text sources), per the mentor-aligrithm / mentor-algorithmic-io precedent

sources.aligrithm: 20 articles incl. paid 10.14 (Gulen-Woeppel convexity), 10.10 (CGO/TK-score), 4.70 (calendar-spread fusion); 3.6/4.2/6.32 regime gates; 3.35 Kendall de-bias; 4.49/4.50 Ehlers FDI; 4.51/4.52 sector-neutral reference code; 3.27/3.28 stop law; 6.43/6.44 specific-factor test; 6.5 U-fold; 2.11/2.12 CMMA; 4.46 COT
sources.quantifiable_edges: 9 CBI posts + 23-row dated CBI spike ledger 2012-2025 (Catapult construction itself is login-gated — NOT accessed, proxy built from public posts)
sources.robotwealth: 3 posts (OU half-life estimator, 0.5x lookback law verified 32% vs 22% p.a., stat-generates-never-certifies)
sources.alvarez: 2 posts (limit-entry 1-4% below close on single names, first-up-close exit, ex-index universe)
sources.chan: 2 posts (AR(1)/ur.df drift estimator, equity-curve-cross live kill, long-only comparison arm)

mempalace_note: rg keyword search is the reliable recall path until a live mempalace connection is pointed at this directory
standing_caveat: D-WEB — every claim web-sourced; ideas/laws only, kill-by-default gauntlet before any money path; no login-gated content accessed; no paid data purchased (PIT single-name blocker recorded, pending founder)
top_3_extractables: Kendall AR(1) de-bias beta_c = beta + (1+3*beta)/n + block-bootstrap 75th-pct half-life gate — fixes the MR-re-enters-too-soon bias; pairs with the verified 0.5x-half-life z-lookback law and the 63d reject bar

Capitulation-BREADTH (CBI) beats raw vol as the MR regime gate — 2020 (vol ~35%) was MR Sharpe +1.2, so the naive disable-in-high-vol rule misses the best MR year; falsifiable S&P100 proxy + 23-row calibration ledger extracted

One-persistence-axis law: AR(1)/Hurst/VR/ER are one number in costumes — one primary + one confirm, never stacked (H165 gate-stack overfit signature); plus the no-tight-stop numbers (-2 ATR stop = -0.55%/trade) and the cross-sectional-demean rule (0.55->0.18 killer)

other_files._README.md: brain profile, when-to-consult/skip, provenance, recall pattern
